APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEPPARS, JOANNA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT PEPPARS, JOANNA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEPPARS, JOANNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 144 EDDY STREET ROOM #309 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,089.04 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,089.04, STAYED UNTIL AUG-15-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC. IF DEFENDANTS VACATES THE PREMISE BY 8/15/03 NOON, PLAINTIFF WILL STIPULATE TO SET ASIDE THE JUDGMENT AND FILE A DISMISSAL AND WILL WAIVE MONEY OWED IN THE AMOUNT OF $2,089.04. DEFENDANT WAIVES RIGHT TO SET ASIDE THIS JUDGMENT OR TO APPLY FOR ANY STAY. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGHT. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TIPTON MANAGEMENT COMPANY, INC. SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-04-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-31-2003 -CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD BY JUDGMENT UNLAWFUL DETAINER. IRVING PFEFFER, PRO TEM JUDGE; D. CARTER, CLERK; VALERIE PAPALE, CSR.
REMOVED FROM MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR AUG-04-2003 - CASE SETTLED AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE BY JUDGMENT UNLAWFUL DETAINER. IRVING PFEFFER, PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK; VALERIE PAPALE, CSR.
